objective: Confirm the daily-only Tushare data collection and processing layer is complete, readable, internally consistent, and protected against raw-close misuse before any model work resumes.
forbidden_actions: Do not call any external API.
Do not run factor validation, model backtests, or portfolio performance analysis.
Do not reinterpret raw close as adjusted close.
Do not remove or weaken the manual interface queue.
acceptance: All expected business-date files exist from 2000-01-01 through 2026-05-28.
All acquired files are readable and contain required columns.
No duplicate ts_code/trade_date rows exist in acquired files.
No acquired files fail OHLCV field checks.
Registry and quality reports agree with scanned files.
V3.44 adjustment guard remains passing and adjusted-return research remains blocked.
